search.name: search
search.description: Search for records in specified group or all databases.

directParameter.name: value
directParameter.description: The search string. Supports keys, operators and wildcards.

parameters.name: comparison
parameters.description: The comparison to use (default no case).

parameters.name: exclude subgroups
parameters.description: Don't search in subgroups of the specified group. Off by default.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The group to search in. Searches in all databases or in the search scope if not specified

import path.name: import path
import path.description: Import a file or folder (including its subfolders).

directParameter.name: value
directParameter.description: The POSIX path or file URL of the file or folder.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The name of the source application.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name for the imported record.

parameters.name: placeholders
parameters.description: Optional placeholders as key-value-pairs for text, RTF/RTFD & HTML/XML templates and filenames. NOTE: The standard placeholders of .dtTemplate packages are also supported if this parameter is specified.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The destination group. Uses incoming group or group selector if not specified.

index path.name: index path
index path.description: Index a file or folder (including its subfolders). Not supported by revision-proof databases.

directParameter.name: value
directParameter.description: The POSIX path or file URL of the file or folder.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The destination group. Uses incoming group or group selector if not specified.

create location.name: create location
create location.description: Create a hierarchy of groups if necessary.

directParameter.name: value
directParameter.description: The hierarchy as a POSIX path (/ in names has to be replaced with \/, see location property).

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The destination database or group. Uses current database if not specified.

directParameter.name: value
directParameter.description: The properties of the record. At least 'type' or 'record type' is required, its value can be also specified as a string.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The destination group for the new record. Uses incoming group or group selector if not specified.

get record at.name: get record at
get record at.description: Search for record at the specified location.

directParameter.name: value
directParameter.description: The location of the record as a POSIX path (/ in names has to be replaced with \/, see location property).

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The base database or group. Uses current database if not specified.

get record with uuid.name: get record with uuid
get record with uuid.description: Get record with the specified uuid or item link.

directParameter.name: value
directParameter.description: The unique identifier or item link.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses all databases if not specified.

lookup records with file.name: lookup records with file
lookup records with file.description: Lookup records whose last path component is the specified file.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses current database if not specified

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses current database if not specified.

lookup records with tags.name: lookup records with tags
lookup records with tags.description: Lookup records with all or any of the specified tags.

parameters.name: any
parameters.description: Lookup any or all (default) tags.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses current database if not specified.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses current database if not specified.

move.name: move
move.description: Move all instances of a record to a different group.  Specify the 'from' group to move a single instance to a different group.

parameters.name: record
parameters.description: The record(s) to move. Indexed items are not supported by revision-proof databases.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The source group. Only applicable if record and destination group are in the same database

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The destination group which doesn't have to be in the same database.

delete.name: delete
delete.description: Delete all instances of a record from the database or one instance from the specified group.

parameters.name: record
parameters.description: The record(s) to delete.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The parent group of this instance.

parameters.name: record
parameters.description: The record(s) to duplicate. Indexed items are not supported by revision-proof databases.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The destination group which doesn't have to be in the same database.

parameters.name: record
parameters.description: The record(s) to replicate.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The destination group which must be in the same database.

compare.name: compare
compare.description: Get a list of similar records, either by specifying a record or a content.

parameters.name: record
parameters.description: The record to compare.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The content to compare.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The database. Uses all databases if not specified.

parameters.name: comparison
parameters.description: The comparison to use (default is data comparison).

classify.name: classify
classify.description: Get a list of classification proposals.

parameters.name: record
parameters.description: The record to classify.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: The database. Uses all databases if not specified.

parameters.name: comparison
parameters.description: The comparison to use (default is data comparison).

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Propose ordinary tags instead of groups (off by default).

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the application.

properties.name: bates number
properties.description: Current bates number.

properties.name: cancelled progress
properties.description: Specifies if a process with a visible progress indicator should be cancelled.

properties.name: current chat engine
properties.description: The default chat engine.

properties.name: current chat model
properties.description: The default chat model.

properties.name: current group
properties.description: The (selected) group of the frontmost window of the current database. Returns root of current database if no current group exists.

properties.name: current workspace
properties.description: The name of the currently used workspace.

properties.name: current database
properties.description: The currently used database.

properties.name: content record
properties.description: The record of the visible document in the frontmost think window.

properties.name: inbox
properties.description: The global inbox.

properties.name: incoming group
properties.description: The default group for new notes. Either global inbox or incoming group of current database if global inbox isn't available.

properties.name: label names
properties.description: List of all 7 label names.

properties.name: last downloaded response
properties.description: The last downloaded HTTP(S) response.

properties.name: last downloaded URL
properties.description: The actual URL of the last download.

properties.name: preferred import destination
properties.description: The default destination for data from external sources. See Settings > Import > Destination.

properties.name: reading list
properties.description: The items of the reading list.

properties.name: selection
properties.description: The current selection of the frontmost main window or the record of the frontmost document window. 'selected records' element is recommended instead especially for bulk retrieval of properties like UUID.

properties.name: strict duplicate recognition
properties.description: Specifies if recognition of duplicates is strict (exact) or not (fuzzy).

properties.name: workspaces
properties.description: The names of all available workspaces.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The scripting identifier of a database.

properties.name: uuid
properties.description: The unique and persistent identifier of a database for external referencing.

properties.name: annotations group
properties.description: The group for annotations, will be created if necessary.

properties.name: comment
properties.description: The comment of the database.

properties.name: current group
properties.description: The (selected) group of the frontmost window. Returns root if no current group exists.

properties.name: incoming group
properties.description: The default group for new notes. Might be identical to root.

properties.name: encrypted
properties.description: Specifies if a database is encrypted or not.

properties.name: revision proof
properties.description: Specifies if a database is revision-proof or not.

properties.name: read only
properties.description: Specifies if a database is read-only and can't be modified.

properties.name: Spotlight indexing
properties.description: Specifies if Spotlight indexing of a database is en- or disabled.

properties.name: versioning
properties.description: Specifies whether versioning of documents is en- or disabled.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the database.

properties.name: filename
properties.description: The filename of the database.

properties.name: path
properties.description: The POSIX path of the database.

properties.name: root
properties.description: The top level group of the database.

properties.name: tags group
properties.description: The group for tags.

properties.name: trash group
properties.description: The trash's group.

properties.name: versions group
properties.description: The group for versioning.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The scripting identifier of a record. Optimizing or closing a database might modify this identifier.

properties.name: MIME type
properties.description: The (proposed) MIME type of a record.

properties.name: uuid
properties.description: The unique and persistent identifier of a record.

properties.name: addition date
properties.description: Date when the record was added to the database.

properties.name: aliases
properties.description: Wiki aliases (separated by commas or semicolons) of a record.

properties.name: altitude
properties.description: The altitude in metres of a record.

properties.name: annotation
properties.description: Annotation of a record. Only plain & rich text and Markdown documents are supported. Read-only in case of revision-proof databases.

properties.name: annotation count
properties.description: The number of annotations. Supported by HTML pages, formatted notes, web archives, PDF, rich text & Markdown documents.

properties.name: attached script
properties.description: POSIX path of script attached to a record.

properties.name: attachment count
properties.description: The number of attachments. Currently only supported for RTFD documents and emails.

properties.name: attributes change date
properties.description: The change date of the record's attributes.

properties.name: bates number
properties.description: Bates number.

properties.name: cells
properties.description: The cells of a sheet. This is a list of rows, each row contains a list of string values for the various colums. Read-only in case of revision-proof databases.

properties.name: character count
properties.description: The character count of a record.

properties.name: color
properties.description: The color of a record. Currently only supported by tags & groups.

properties.name: columns
properties.description: The column names of a sheet.

properties.name: comment
properties.description: The comment of a record.

properties.name: content hash
properties.description: Stored SHA1 hash of files and document packages.

properties.name: creation date
properties.description: The creation date of a record. Read-only in case of revision-proof databases.

properties.name: custom meta data
properties.description: User-defined metadata of a record as a dictionary containing key-value pairs. Setting a value for an unknown key automatically adds a definition to Settings > Data.

properties.name: data
properties.description: The file data of a record. Currently only supported by PDF documents, images, rich text documents and web archives. Read-only in case of revision-proof databases.

properties.name: database
properties.description: The database of the record.

properties.name: date
properties.description: The (creation/modification) date of a record. Read-only in case of revision-proof databases.

properties.name: digital object identifier
properties.description: Digital object identifier (DOI) extracted from text of document, e.g. a scanned receipt, or from the title.

properties.name: dimensions
properties.description: The width and height of an image or PDF document in pixels or points.

properties.name: document amount
properties.description: Amount extracted from text of document, e.g. a scanned receipt.

properties.name: document date
properties.description: First date extracted from text of document, e.g. a scan.

properties.name: all document dates
properties.description: All dates extracted from text of document, e.g. a scan.

properties.name: document name
properties.description: Name based on text or properties of document

properties.name: dpi
properties.description: The resultion of an image in dpi.

properties.name: duplicates
properties.description: The duplicates of a record (only other instances, not including the record).

properties.name: duration
properties.description: The duration of audio and video files.

properties.name: encrypted
properties.description: Specifies if a document is encrypted or not. Currently only supported by PDF documents.

properties.name: exclude from chat
properties.description: Exclude group or record from chat.

properties.name: exclude from classification
properties.description: Exclude group or record from classifying.

properties.name: exclude from search
properties.description: Exclude group or record from searching.

properties.name: exclude from see also
properties.description: Exclude record from see also.

properties.name: exclude from tagging
properties.description: Exclude group from tagging.

properties.name: exclude from Wiki linking
properties.description: Exclude record from automatic Wiki linking.

properties.name: filename
properties.description: The current filename of a record.

properties.name: flag
properties.description: The flag of a record.

properties.name: geolocation
properties.description: The human readable geogr. location of a record.

properties.name: height
properties.description: The height of an image or PDF document in pixels or points.

properties.name: image
properties.description: The image or PDF document of a record. Setting supports both raw data and strings containing paths or URLs. Read-only in case of revision-proof databases.

properties.name: indexed
properties.description: Indexed or imported record.

properties.name: international standard book number
properties.description: International standard book number (ISBN) extracted from text of document, e.g. a scanned receipt, or from the title.

properties.name: interval
properties.description: Refresh interval of a feed. Currently overriden by settings.

properties.name: kind
properties.description: The human readable and localized kind of a record. WARNING: Don't use this to check the type of a record, otherwise your script might fail depending on the version and the localization.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Index of label (0-7) of a record.

properties.name: language
properties.description: ISO code, e.g. 'en' or 'de', of language of document.

properties.name: latitude
properties.description: The latitude in degrees of a record.

properties.name: location
properties.description: The primary location of the record in the database as a POSIX path (/ in names is replaced with \/).

properties.name: location group
properties.description: The group of the record's primary location. This is identical to the first parent group.

properties.name: location with name
properties.description: The full primary location of the record including its name (/ in names is replaced with \/).

properties.name: locking
properties.description: The locking of a record. Read-only in case of revision-proof databases.

properties.name: longitude
properties.description: The longitude in degrees of a record.

properties.name: markdown source
properties.description: The Markdown source of a record if available or the record converted to Markdown if possible.

properties.name: meta data
properties.description: Document metadata (e.g. of PDF & RTF documents, web pages or emails) of a record as a dictionary containing key-value pairs.

properties.name: modification date
properties.description: The modification date of a record. Read-only in case of revision-proof databases.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of a record.

properties.name: name without date
properties.description: The name of a record without any dates.

properties.name: name without extension
properties.description: The name of a record without a file extension (independent of settings).

properties.name: newest document date
properties.description: Newest date extracted from text of document, e.g. a scan.

properties.name: number of duplicates
properties.description: The number of duplicates of a record.

properties.name: number of hits
properties.description: The number of hits of a record.

properties.name: number of replicants
properties.description: The number of replicants of a record.

properties.name: oldest document date
properties.description: Oldest date extracted from text of document, e.g. a scan.

properties.name: original name
properties.description: The original name of a record.

properties.name: opening date
properties.description: Date when a content was opened the last time or when a feed was refreshed the last time.

properties.name: page count
properties.description: The page count of a record. Currently only supported by PDF documents.

properties.name: paginated PDF
properties.description: A printed/converted PDF of the record.

properties.name: path
properties.description: The POSIX file path of a record. Only the path of external records can be changed. Not accessible at all in case of revision-proof databases.

properties.name: pending
properties.description: Flag whether the (latest) contents of a record haven't been downloaded from a sync location yet.

properties.name: plain text
properties.description: The plain text of a record. Read-only in case of revision-proof databases. Setting this property of images, PDF documents, audio or video files sets the searchable, e.g. transcribed, text.

properties.name: proposed filename
properties.description: The proposed filename for a record.

properties.name: rating
properties.description: Rating (0-5) of a record.

properties.name: record type
properties.description: The type of a record. WARNING: Don't use string conversions of this type for comparisons, this might fail due to known scripting issues of macOS.

properties.name: reference URL
properties.description: The URL (x-devonthink-item://...) to reference/link back to a record.

properties.name: reminder
properties.description: Reminder of a record.

properties.name: rich text
properties.description: The rich text of the record (see extended text suite). Changes are only supported in case of RTF/RTFD documents and not by revision-proof databases.

properties.name: score
properties.description: The score of the last comparison, classification or search (value between 0.0 and 1.0) or undefined otherwise.

properties.name: size
properties.description: The size of a record in bytes.

properties.name: source
properties.description: The HTML/XML source of a record if available or the record converted to HTML if possible. Read-only in case of revision-proof databases.

properties.name: tag type
properties.description: The tag type of a record.

properties.name: tags
properties.description: The tags of a record. Setting accepts both strings and parents.

properties.name: thumbnail
properties.description: The thumbnail of a record. Setting supports both raw data and strings containing paths or URLs.

properties.name: unlinked Wiki links
properties.description: List of Wiki links not yet referencing an item in the database. NOTE: This list depends on the Wiki linking settings.

properties.name: unread
properties.description: The unread flag of a record.

properties.name: URL
properties.description: The URL of a record. Read-only in case of bookmarks in revision-proof databases.

properties.name: web archive
properties.description: The web archive of a record if available or the record converted to web archive if possible.

properties.name: width
properties.description: The width of an image or PDF document in pixels or points.

properties.name: word count
properties.description: The word count of a record.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The scripting identifier of a record. Optimizing or closing a database might modify this identifier.

properties.name: MIME type
properties.description: The (proposed) MIME type of a record.

properties.name: uuid
properties.description: The unique and persistent identifier of a record.

properties.name: addition date
properties.description: Date when the record was added to the database.

properties.name: aliases
properties.description: Wiki aliases (separated by commas or semicolons) of a record.

properties.name: altitude
properties.description: The altitude in metres of a record.

properties.name: color
